initial-loading: Shown while the application checks whether the user is logged in.
logged-in: Short account status shown before the current Wikimedia username in the page header.
logout: Link text for signing out of the tool.
app-language: Label for the interface language selector.
footer-tutorial: Footer link text for opening CropTool documentation.
footer-report-issues: Footer link text for opening the issue report page.
loginform-header: Heading for the form that asks the user to authorize the tool.
loginform-blurb:
Short description of the tool shown on the authorization screen. Parameters:
* {{url}} - link to the Commons help page for CropTool.
loginform-help: Explains that OAuth authorization does not give the tool the user's password.
INVALID_COOKIE: Warning shown when the user's session cookie is no longer valid.
loginform-submit-button: Button text for starting OAuth authorization.
titleform-header: Heading for the form where the user enters a file URL or filename.
titleform-help: Help text for the file URL or filename field.
titleform-file-label: Label and placeholder for the field where the user enters a file URL or filename.
titleform-submit-button: Button text for opening the entered file.
titleform-footer:
Tip shown below the file input form. Parameters:
* {{url}} - link to Commons documentation.
titleform-file-found: Short success message shown when the entered file exists.
titleform-file-not-found: Short error message shown when the entered file could not be found.
file-waiting-for-license-review: Error shown when the selected file is waiting for license review and should not be cropped yet.
fetching-progress: Shown while file data and metadata are being loaded before the image appears.
view-at-site:
Link text for opening the file page on the source Wikimedia site. Parameters:
* {{site}} - Wikimedia site hostname.
original-dimensions:
Shows the original image dimensions. Parameters:
* {{width}} - width in pixels
* {{height}} - height in pixels.
thumb-dimensions:
Shows thumbnail dimensions. Parameters:
* {{width}} - width in pixels
* {{height}} - height in pixels.
crop-dimensions:
Shows the selected crop dimensions. Parameters:
* {{width}} - width in pixels
* {{height}} - height in pixels.
cropped-dimensions:
Shows the resulting cropped image dimensions. Parameters:
* {{width}} - width in pixels
* {{height}} - height in pixels.
cropform-border-locator: Button text for automatically finding a border around the image.
cropform-orientation: Heading for controls that rotate or straighten the image.
cropform-rotate-left: Tooltip for rotating the image 90 degrees counter-clockwise.
cropform-rotate-right: Tooltip for rotating the image 90 degrees clockwise.
cropform-straighten: Label for the small-angle straighten slider.
cropform-straighten-auto: Button text for automatically detecting the straighten angle.
cropform-orientation-reset: Tooltip for resetting rotation and straighten settings.
cropform-crop: Heading for crop position and size controls.
left: Label for the crop area's left offset.
top: Label for the crop area's top offset.
width: Label for the crop area's width.
height: Label for the crop area's height.
page: Label for selecting a page in a multipage file.
cropform-method: Heading for selecting the crop method.
cropform-method-precise: Crop method that exactly follows the selected crop area.
cropform-method-lossless: Crop method for JPEG files that avoids recompression quality loss.
cropform-method-precise-help: Tooltip explaining the precise crop method.
cropform-method-lossless-help: Tooltip explaining the lossless crop method.
cropform-preview-btn: Button text for generating a crop preview.
cropform-help: Link or button text for help.
cropform-aspect-ratio-keep: Aspect-ratio option that keeps the original file's ratio.
cropform-aspect-ratio-square: Aspect-ratio option for a square crop.
cropform-aspect-ratio-fixed: Aspect-ratio option for a custom fixed ratio.
cropform-adjustments: Heading for brightness, contrast, and saturation controls.
cropform-brightness: Label for the brightness adjustment control.
cropform-contrast: Label for the contrast adjustment control.
cropform-saturation: Label for the saturation adjustment control.
cropform-adjustments-auto: Button text for automatically suggesting one adjustment value.
cropform-adjustments-reset: Button text for resetting brightness, contrast, and saturation controls.
cropform-aspect-ratio-values: Label for the numeric aspect-ratio fields.
cropform-aspect-ratio-width: Accessible label for the aspect-ratio width field.
cropform-aspect-ratio-height: Accessible label for the aspect-ratio height field.
cropform-aspect-ratio-lock: Tooltip for locking the aspect ratio.
cropform-aspect-ratio-unlock: Tooltip for unlocking the aspect ratio.
cropping-progress: Shown while the server creates the cropped image.
previewform-lossless-crop-performed: Success message shown after a lossless crop preview has been created.
previewform-lossless-explanation: Short explanation shown when a lossless crop is larger than the user's exact selection.
previewform-precise-crop-performed: Success message shown after a precise crop preview has been created.
previewform-overwrite-policy:
Warning shown when overwriting a Commons file is selected. Parameters:
* {{url}} - link to Commons overwrite policy.
previewform-overwrite-policy-help: Tooltip summarizing when overwriting an existing file is appropriate.
previewform-assessment-template: Warning shown when overwriting is disabled because the source file has assessment templates.
previewform-donotcrop-template: Warning shown when overwriting is disabled because the source file is tagged as not to be cropped or has an intentional border.
previewform-upload-protected: Warning shown when overwriting is disabled because the source file is upload protected.
previewform-rename-tip: Suggestion shown below the new filename field.
previewform-multipage-file: Warning shown when overwriting is disabled because the source is a multipage file.
previewform-removed-border: Checkbox label confirming that a border-removal template should be removed from the new file.
previewform-trimmed: Checkbox label confirming that a trimming template should be removed from the new file.
previewform-removed-watermark: Checkbox label confirming that a watermark template should be removed from the new file.
previewform-wikidata-crop:
Checkbox label for adding the cropped image to a Wikidata item. Parameters:
* {{link}} - HTML link to the Wikidata item.
previewform-wikidata-crop-help: Tooltip explaining the Wikidata crop checkbox.
previewform-overwrite: Option label for overwriting the original file.
previewform-create-new: Option label for uploading the crop as a new file.
previewform-new-title: Label for the new filename field.
previewform-metadata: Heading for metadata that can be copied to the new file.
previewform-depicts: Subheading for Wikibase depicts statements copied to the new file.
previewform-categories: Subheading for Commons categories copied to the new file.
previewform-new-title-exists: Linked warning text that the entered filename already exists.
previewform-new-title-exists-confirm-ove: Short confirmation button label for allowing the existing destination filename to be overwritten.
previewform-new-title-exists-overwrite-w:
Warning shown next to the filename field when the new filename already exists. Parameters:
* {{url}} - link to Commons overwrite policy.
previewform-upload-comment: Heading for the upload comment text field.
previewform-back-btn: Button text for returning from preview to crop editing.
previewform-upload-btn: Button text for uploading the crop.
upload-progress: Shown while the cropped file is being uploaded.
results-success-details:
Details shown after a successful upload. Parameters:
* {{url}} - link to the uploaded file.
results-success-details-short: Short link text shown after a successful upload. The surrounding notice links to the uploaded file.
results-success-wikidata:
Message shown after adding the cropped image to Wikidata. Parameters:
* {{link}} - HTML link to the Wikidata item.
results-failure:
Error message shown after upload failure. Parameters:
* {{error}} - error returned by the server.
